videos.title: Cross-country ski race, mass start
videos.description: The start of the men's 20 km classic style cross-country ski race at the 2011 NCAA collegiate ski championships at the Trapp Family Lodge in Stowe, Vermont, 11 Mar 2011.

videos.title: Stowe Derby Returns
videos.description: The annual Stowe Derby brought racers of all skill levels and ages to compete from the top of Mount Manfield to downtown Stowe.
videos.transcript:
looking at your community a beloved
Stowe tradition is back this year it's a
race that combines Alpine and Nordic
skiing downhill in Cross Country ABC
22's Isabel shoneman went to Mount
Mansfield this morning to check it out
the 78th annual Stow Derby has ski

videos.title: Trapp Cross Country Ski Area, Stowe, Vermont
videos.description:
We had a great time! Trapp is ok for occasional family outing, but limited in size and outrageously overpriced for what you're getting. Then again, there are not may options in this part of Vermont, so if you love cross country skiing, you can't win.

videos.title: No Matter How #3: Untracked Stowe
videos.description:
New Episodes posted first here: http://www.skitheeast.net/tv/channel/Meathead%20Films
No Matter What on DVD: https://store.skitheeast.net/products/no_matter_what_dvd.html
No Matter What on iTunes: https://itunes.apple.com/us/movie/no-matter-what-east-coast/id577637452

When it's good at Stowe there's no better tree skiing on the East Coast. Last season's weather made for some short windows of opportunity, but the end of February and beginning of March were as good as is gets...

"No Matter How" is a behind-the-scenes and bonus footage webisode series chronicling the 2012 winter with Meathead Films. The series showcases just how the crew managed the season, dealt with the struggles and logged lots of worthy outtakes that never made it into the feature movie. The feature length film "No Matter What" was released on DVD and iTunes in the fall of 2012.

videos.title: Fischer Nordic | Live to Ski | Tour de Hollenbach
videos.description:
Fischer and Skirack are proud to present #livetoski “Tour de Hollenbach”. 

In 2022, the Hollenbach family explored 23 cross-country ski centers around the state of Vermont, one of the top Nordic destinations in the U.S.A. The project was dubbed the “Tour de Hollenbach,” an incredible adventure for Jake, Helen, and their son Johannes.

In this short video, we catch up with the Hollenbach family as they navigate the fun and challenges of cross-country skiing with a 3-year-old. Jake and Helen made it a positive experience for their son with appropriate gear, groomed trails, and plenty of snacks.

Jake Hollenbach is a Fischer Nordic athlete and Nordic expert at the Skirack, a ski & outdoor shop located in Burlington, Vermont.

Blog recaps of "Tour de Hollenbach:"
Tour De Hollenbach Part 1: Sleepy Hollow through Rikert 
▲ https://www.skirack.com/blog/tour-de-hollenbach-sleepy-hollow-through-rikert/
Tour De Hollenbach Part 2: Blueberry Lake to Prospect Mountain
▲ https://www.skirack.com/blog/tour-de-hollenbach-part2-blueberry-through-prospect/
Tour De Hollenbach Part 3: Stowe Mountain to Craftsbury
▲ https://www.skirack.com/blog/tour-de-hollenbach-part3-stowe-through-craftsbury/

Subscribe to Fischer Sports on Youtube: https://youtube.com/fischersports

FOLLOW FISCHER SPORTS ON SOCIAL 
▲ Fischer Ski on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fischerski
▲ Fischer Nordic on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fischernordic
▲ Fischer Ski on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/fischerski 
▲ Fischer Nordic on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/fischernordic

▲ Visit our Website: http://www.fischersports.com 
▲ Visit SkiRack's Website: https://www.skirack.com/

SKIING IS OUR LIFE.
Fischer’s vision is to be the athlete’s number one choice through outstanding products, made for everlasting moments and new levels of individual performance. Our mission is to enable athletes to enjoy their sport and excel to the next level by introducing the most innovative, reliable, and easy to use products.

For us, skiing is not a lifestyle. It’s life. #livetoski
